_publications._publicationTitle: STING activation reprograms the microenvironment to sensitize NF1-related malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: As a result of spontaneous loss of the WT Nf1 and p53 alleles, cisNf1 +/– p53 (hereafter referred to as +/– cisNP) mice develop a variety of sarcomas including MPNST (cis MPNST) between 3 and 7 months of age.
details: Develops variety of sarcomas including MPNST between 3 and 7 months of age due to spontaneous loss of WT Nf1 and p53 alleles
